title: Daily Briefing — March 8, 2026 | Geopolitical Risk, Stalled Disinflation
description: This comprehensive March 8, 2026 edition of the Slotly News Daily Briefing provides an in-depth, structured, and strictly neutral analysis of the current global business and financial landscape. The episode leads with an extensive examination of the escalating geopolitical crisis in the Middle East and its profound implications for global energy supplies, trade routes, and the macroeconomic outlook. title: Matt Williams OAM | Epstein Files, WW3 & A World About to Snap | TSWS #198
description:
Send us Fan Mail
Matt “Willy” Williams OAM is an Australian content creator, independent military analyst and veteran with a strong online presence across YouTube and Instagram, where he’s built a large and highly engaged audience. He’s known for delivering unfiltered commentary on geopolitics, global conflict, and world affairs.
